hero_lede: For more than 30 years, Peninsula Youth Theatre has been the Bay Area's home for transformative theatre education and family-friendly productions. From first auditions to opening nights, we believe every child deserves a stage.
discovery_heading: Whatever you're looking for, we've got it.

discovery_cards.title: Mainstage Productions
discovery_cards.body: Three full-scale shows every year, performed by youth ages 6–18 at Mountain View's premier venue.

discovery_cards.title: Classes & Summer Camps
discovery_cards.body: From after-school drama to week-long summer intensives, our programs build skills, confidence, and friendships.

discovery_cards.title: Stories on Stage
discovery_cards.body: Beloved children's books brought to life in short, lively performances designed for young audiences and school groups.

discovery_cards.title: Costume & Prop Rentals
discovery_cards.body: Decades of theatrical inventory available to schools and community theatre at affordable rates.

discovery_cards.title: Studio Intensives
discovery_cards.body: Focused, multi-week deep dives in voice, movement, scene study, and audition technique for committed teen performers.

donate_lede: Ticket sales and tuition cover much of what we do. The rest — scholarships, school touring, capital needs — comes from donors like you.
